Download for free

Stick & Celly Contest

Open to boys and girls in gymnastics, cheerleading, trampoline, and tumbling.

Submit Official Entry Form (bottom of page)

Enter to Win a $250 Prize Pack

Exclusive Coach Bowman Training Tank, Tripod, One Year Coach Bowman Subscription, and a $100 Amazon Giftcard.

Stick a Dismount, Hit a Celly.

Capture a stuck dismount followed by your favorite celebration using the Coach Bowman app. Want to stand out? Add your favorite skills before the dismount.

Two New Winners in 0 Days

How to Enter the #CoachBowmanContest

Step 1: Submit the Official Entry Form (Bottom of this page)

Submissions will only be accepted if the Official Entry Form has been completed and submitted below.

Step 2: Download the Coach Bowman App

All submission must be captured using the Coach Bowman App. The Coach Bowman app is free to use. No payment is required to qualify for this contest.

Step 3: Capture Your Clip with the #CoachBowmanContest Watermark (See Video)

Submissions videos must include the Coach Bowman watermark that the app generates. Use the #CoachBowmanContest button while clipping. This will add the required overlay.

Step 4: Post on Instagram, Tag @coach.bowman.app, and Hashtag #CoachBowmanContest

Post your clip as a Reel, tag @coach.bowman.app, and include #CoachBowmanContest to complete your entry.

Additional Information

Multiple Submissions

Participants may submit an unlimited number of unique entries up to the last drawing in May. Once submitted, each entry remains eligible for every drawing that occurs later in that month.

How Winners Are Picked

We pick the most creative, funny, or unique entries. It is not about the hardest skill or highest score.

How We Will Contact Winners

Winners will be messaged on Instagram. Be sure to follow @coach.bowman.app and have your DMs open. Winners are expected to respond within 48 hours to claim their prizes, and provide a photo for the winner announcement posts. If a winner does not respond within 48 hours, an alternate winner will be selected.

Enter the #CoachBowmanContest

To officially enter #CoachBowmanContest, you must complete this form and agree to the Terms and Conditions.

Official Entry Form

This legal form is required for giveaway eligibility. Entries without this form and Terms acceptance are not valid.

Official Entry Form Confirmed

Your official entry form has been submitted. To complete your contest entry, finish the remaining steps below.

✓ Step 1: Submit the Official Entry Form

Completed. Continue with the remaining steps below to finish your contest entry.

Step 2: Download the Coach Bowman App

Your contest clip must be captured in the Coach Bowman app.

Step 3: Capture Your Clip with the #CoachBowmanContest Watermark

Use the #CoachBowmanContest button while clipping so the required watermark and overlay are included.

Step 4: Post on Instagram, Tag @coach.bowman.app, and Hashtag #CoachBowmanContest

Post your Reel, tag @coach.bowman.app, and include #CoachBowmanContest to complete your entry.
